data.title: CPSC warns to stop using Velazzio Thermo1 Battery Heated Gloves due to burn hazard; sold on Amazon.com.
data.description: The U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) issued a warning on July 31, 2025, regarding the Velazzio Thermo1 Battery Heated Gloves. Consumers are advised to cease the use of these gloves promptly as they present a significant risk of injury. The gloves have exhibited the potential to overheat or create hotspots while in use, posing a danger to users. It is crucial for consumers to discontinue using these gloves to avoid any potential harm.

data.title: KNIPEX NA launches enhanced Cobra® ES, adding more functions and new 7 1/4" size for improved accessibility and capacity.
data.description: Introducing the KNIPEX Cobra® ES, a enhanced version of the original Cobra tool, featuring improved accessibility, increased capacity, and additional functions. With a new size of 7 1/4", this updated tool promises to provide even more benefits to tradesmen. Released on July 31, 2025, in BUFFALO GROVE, Illinois, the Cobra ES is designed to offer users an upgraded experience with its enhanced features.

data.title: Danny Lee appointed as Managing Director for Greater China at Monks, a digital brand of S4Capital plc. Effective immediately.
data.description: Shanghai, July 31, 2025 - Monks, a worldwide digital brand under S4Capital plc, has appointed Danny Lee as the Managing Director of Monks Greater China. Lee assumes the position with immediate effect and will collaborate closely in his new role.

data.title: BayCare Health System in Clearwater, Fla., receives 2025 Pharmacy Compounding Excellence Award from Premier Inc.
data.description: In Clearwater, Florida on July 31, 2025, BayCare Health System, a prominent not-for-profit academic health care system in West Central Florida, was honored with the prestigious 2025 Pharmacy Compounding Excellence Award by Premier, Inc., a top technology-driven healthcare organization. This recognition highlights BayCare's exceptional performance in the field of pharmacy compounding.

data.title: New EURAU stablecoin backed by Deutsche Bank launched, euro stablecoins are only 0.2% of market despite 60% growth since late 2024.
data.description: The new EURAU stablecoin by AllUnity has been introduced into the market. Currently, euro-denominated stablecoins only make up 0.2% of the stablecoin market. However, these stablecoins have seen a significant 60% increase since late 2024.

data.title: Brightspeed's Fixed Wireless Voice and Data Solution wins 2025 ISE Network Innovators' Top Honor in Charlotte, NC on July 31, 2025.
data.description: Brightspeed, a leading fiber broadband provider based in Charlotte, North Carolina, was recently recognized with the highest award for its innovative hardware and technology. The company is known as the nation's third-largest builder of fiber broadband and boasts the title of having the fastest internet service in the country. This acknowledgment was given by HighSpeedInternet.com's Annual report for the year 2025, highlighting Brightspeed's exceptional performance in the industry. This accolade showcases Brightspeed's dedication to providing top-quality internet services, solidifying its position as a key player in the market.

data.title: Instem achieves a major milestone, acquires all shares of Xybion from Banerjee Group LLC controlled by Dr. Pradip K. Banerjee
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.7%. This marks a significant improvement from last year's rate of 4.2%. The number of new jobs created in the last month alone has exceeded expectations, with a total of 250,000 jobs added to the economy. This has been attributed to growth in various sectors, including technology, healthcare, and manufacturing. Additionally, wages have seen a modest increase, with the average hourly wage rising by 2.8% compared to the same period last year. Overall, the labor market appears to be robust and shows promising signs of continued growth.

data.title: China Hangover Hits Anheuser-Busch InBev: Q2 Miss Sends Stock Down 11%
data.description: Anheuser-Busch Inbev (NYSE: BUD) experienced a drop in premarket trading on Thursday. They reported second-quarter adjusted earnings per share of 98 cents, surpassing the projected 97 cents. However, quarterly sales of $15.004 billion fell short of the expected $15.380 billion. Revenue witnessed a 3.0% increase during the quarter. The company observed a notable 5.6% rise in combined revenues from megabrands, notably Corona, which saw a 7.7% growth outside its domestic market in Q2 2025. Interestingly, volumes dipped by 1.9% in the reviewed quarter - beer volumes decreased by 2.2% and non-beer volumes recorded an increase. This data comes alongside the noteworthy information that Microsoft and Meta stocks collectively added $440 billion in value in a single day, nearly matching Netflix's entire $503 billion market capitalization.

data.title: Aniai's Alpha Cloud revolutionizes grill servicing with predictive care, improving commercial kitchens maintenance.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in New York City, Aniai, a top provider of kitchen automation technology, is revolutionizing the way restaurants manage and upkeep their essential kitchen machinery. By introducing Alpha Cloud into the Alpha Grill (Aniai's primary product), the company has implemented a data-focused approach...

data.title: Gloo buys Masterworks, aims to support faith organizations' growth with shared mission. Acquisition made on 31 July 2025.
data.description: Gloo, a technology platform for faith-based and flourishing organizations, has recently acquired a strategic partner to further their shared goals of promoting growth, success, and positive impact within the community. The acquisition was finalized on July 31, 2025, in Boulder, Colorado. This move is expected to significantly boost their mission and expand their reach in assisting these organizations in achieving their objectives.

data.title: ZOTH launches FAAST for tokenization with $200M assets committed, expanding institutional infrastructure.
data.description: In a recent announcement from the Cayman Islands on July 31, 2025, Zoth revealed progress in its financial framework. With the successful establishment of a regulated fund structure via a Cayman Islands Segregated Portfolio Company (SPC), Zoth is now pioneering the extension of this model to Real-World Asset issuances. This strategic move marks a significant milestone in their institutional infrastructure development, ensuring secure and compliant investment opportunities.

data.title: New company becomes third largest holder of Ethereum, acquiring $56.9 million worth of ETH, surpassing Ethereum Foundation.
data.description: The recently established company now holds more ETH than the Ethereum Foundation, which oversees the blockchain, demonstrating a significant increase in their ETH holdings.
